title: Broadway Scandals
writer: Norman Houston, Howard J. Green, Gladys Lehman
actors: Sally O'Neil, Jack Egan, Carmel Myers
plot: When the road-show that Ted Howard, a singer, and Mary, a chorus-dancer, goes broke and the company is stranded in the sticks, Ted Uses his own savings to get them all back to New York. Ted and Mary form a team and are doing well ...
